component.name: PeerBeat
component.summary: Local-first music player with LAN peer-to-peer sharing

description.p: PeerBeat plays your local music and lets you share playlists with people on the same network. Peers discover your library automatically over mDNS, stream tracks with full playback controls, or download them — all encrypted with TLS and without ever touching the internet. Start a party session and everyone hears the same song in sync.

ul.li: Gapless playback, crossfade, pitch-preserving speed, EQ, ReplayGain
Fast library for 50k+ tracks with fuzzy search and smart playlists
LAN sharing with PIN / approval, per-playlist permissions, party mode
No cloud, no accounts, no telemetry — everything stays local

description.p: Full UI localization into 10 languages (incl. RTL Arabic) and in-app auto-update for the side-loaded Windows and Android builds.
Audit-driven correctness, security, and accessibility pass; rebuilt documentation. Toward a release candidate.
